description: John Zenon, a 34-year-old pipefitter, presents to the occupational health clinic with chills, muscle aches, and a cough after welding galvanized steel in a poorly ventilated bay. As the occupational health professional, document an acute episode of metal fume fever for this patient in GNU Health. The clinical documentation must include an exposure diagnosis from the ICD-10 J68 or T59 family, a clinical evaluation recording an elevated temperature, a prescription for symptomatic relief, two diagnostic baseline tests, and a scheduled short-interval follow-up appointment. Login: admin / gnusolidario.
